title: Part 6. Workshop - Application Access with Teleport

resources.title: rawcodeacademy/courses GitHub repository
resources.evidence_quote: If this is your first workshop, you can find all of these courses at github.com/rawcodeacademy/courses.

resources.title: Teleport configuration file reference
resources.evidence_quote: My favorite page is reference. Go here, click and config fail. Everything you can turn on is commented and documented on this file.

resources.title: jwt.io JWT debugger
resources.evidence_quote: We're gonna go to jwt.io. This is like the de facto say if you're ever doing JWT stuff and you just be able to debug why it's not working, just go here because it has this thing where you paste it in

resources.title: get.docker.io Docker install script
resources.evidence_quote: Now, whenever I need to install Docker, I go to get. Docker.io and I grab this.
